title: Pee Safe × Smriti Mandhana — #BeInYourComfortZone
description: Donayan Sahdev was Director / Associate Producer on Pee Safe's #BeInYourComfortZone with Smriti Mandanna (2026). The film reframes period care as confident and comfortable — cancelling the struggle, one cycle at a time, with bright, female-first storytelling built for social sharing.
meta: Pee Safe's #BeInYourComfortZone with Smriti Mandanna (2026) — Donayan Sahdev, Director / Associate Producer, reframes period care as confident and comfortable.

title: Aarohi Loans for Women
description: For Godrej Capital's Aarohi Loans for Women (2026), Donayan Sahdev served as Director / Associate Producer on a film reframing borrowing as empowerment. Intimate, real-world vignettes position Aarohi as a trusted partner in financial independence for women entrepreneurs.
meta: Godrej Capital Aarohi Loans for Women (2026) — Donayan Sahdev, Director / Associate Producer, reframes borrowing as empowerment for women entrepreneurs.

title: Centrum × Kajal Aggarwal — Chief Claims Advocate
description: Donayan Sahdev was Director / Associate Producer on two Centrum 'Chief Claims' films with Kajal Agarwal (2025). Credibility-led direction and a composed on-screen presence balance star appeal with product clarity to earn the confidence of health-conscious households.
meta: Centrum 'Chief Claims' films with Kajal Agarwal (2025) — Donayan Sahdev, Director / Associate Producer, balancing star appeal with product clarity.
